rationale.R1.2: The agent provides detailed suggestions for improving the prose and identifies several logical inconsistencies in the claims.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty where appropriate, such as when discussing the representativeness of the validation set and the generalizability of results.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the paragraph without any drift or omissions, providing a comprehensive list of concerns and suggestions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content while highlighting potential downstream impacts, such as the strong recommendation for DEEP-z use in 3x2pt analyses.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent provides detailed feedback, it does not trace every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
